content.speakerText: I got you something—hope you like it!
content.speakerTextCn: 我给你带了礼物，希望你喜欢！
expectedAnswers: Oh my gosh, you shouldn't have! It's perfect!
Aw, thanks so much—I'm so touched!
evaluationCriteria: 是否表达了惊喜或感动（意图达成度）
是否使用了恰当的礼貌表达（如 shouldn't have, thanks so much）（语言准确性）
语气是否自然真诚，符合英语口语习惯（表达自然度）

content.speakerText: I made this cake for you—it's not fancy, but I hope you like it.
content.speakerTextCn: 我为你做了这个蛋糕，虽然不华丽，但希望你喜欢。
expectedAnswers: You didn't have to bake this, but thank you—it looks amazing!
This is so sweet of you! I can't wait to try it!
Wow, you're the best! I'm so grateful!
evaluationCriteria: 是否回应了对方的谦逊表达并给予积极反馈（意图达成度）
是否使用了场景关键词如 'sweet of you', 'grateful', 'didn't have to'（关键词覆盖）
语气是否温暖自然，避免冷淡或抱怨（表达自然度）
